candidate.description:
🎯 **Claiming this bounty!**

I've submitted a complete implementation: https://github.com/bolivian-peru/baozi-openclaw/pull/64

**What's built:**
- Full x402 agent-to-agent marketplace for prediction market analysis
- Analyst agents publish analyses behind x402 paywall (HTTP 402)
- Buyer agents discover, evaluate (scoring system), and purchase via x402 micropayment
- Reputation tracking with 6 tiers based on verified prediction accuracy
- Affiliate commissions — analysts earn 1% lifetime on ref

It's designed to fetch live data and can be easily integrated with the Baozi MCP server.
